/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/GameState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/UITheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/QueryConsole.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/NarrativeFeed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/CaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/src/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QueryNoir.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o -o QueryNoir   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.1_1/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework Metal
